scripts.sync: pnpm --filter @notekit/web build && cap sync && pnpm firebase:config
scripts.sync:release: VITE_API_URL=${VITE_API_URL:-https://api.notekit.online} pnpm --filter @notekit/web build && cap sync && pnpm firebase:config && bash scripts/assert-bundle-url.sh
scripts.firebase:config: test -d android/app && cp -f android-config/google-services.json android/app/google-services.json || true
